title: Context derives Clone, leaking key material via implicit copy
description:
Location: rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs:110
Issue: Context contains master_secret, sender_key, recipient_key (all key material) and derives Clone. This allows callers to clone security contexts, duplicating key material in memory. The clone won't be zeroized when the original is dropped.
Impact: Key material may persist longer in memory than intended.
Fix: Remove Clone derive, or document explicitly that cloned contexts must also be properly dropped.
